hero.title: Build AI Agents from Any Website
hero.subtitle: Enter a URL, and we'll crawl the entire website to create a smart AI chatbot that knows everything about that company.

crawl.title: 1. Enter a URL
crawl.description: Paste any company website URL and we'll automatically crawl all accessible pages.

build.title: 2. AI Builds the Agent
build.description: Our system processes the content, creates embeddings, and builds a knowledge base.

chat.title: 3. Chat with Your Agent
chat.description: Ask questions about the company and get accurate, sourced answers instantly.

share.title: 4. Share with Anyone
share.description: Share a unique link so anyone can interact with your company agent.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

signup.title: Create Account
signup.subtitle: Sign up to start building AI agents

errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noAgents: No agents yet. Create your first one!

new.title: Create New Agent
new.subtitle: Enter a website URL to start building an AI agent

chat.title: Chat with {agentName}
